import react from "react"; let theme = [ { id : 1, Name : "Theme 1", Price : "Price 1", Description : "Details 1 " }, { id : 2, Name : "Theme 2", Price : "Price 2", Description : "Details 2 " }, { id : 3, Name : "Theme 3", Price : "Price 3", Description : "Details 3 " }, { id : 4, Name : "Theme 4", Price : "Price 4", Description : "Details 4 " } ] const AddTheme = (Theme) => { return <>
Curtain Gifts Gift Themes Orders Logout




{theme.map(theme => { return(
< div className="box" id = {theme.id}> {theme.Name} {theme.Price} - {theme.Description}

) })}

} export default AddTheme;
